title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: MAIN OFFICE UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Utility payment assistance for water, electricity, natural gas, oil, propane, wood, pellets, and other heating fuels. Payments are issued directly to vendors and assistance may only be received once over per 12 month period. 211 SE Byers Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: LIHEAP: 60% State Median Income Emergency Assistance: Must have shut-off notice or have been disconnected Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon (541) 276-1926 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 276-1926 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-1926 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, address, photo ID, and Social Security cards for all members of the household, current utility bill, shut-off notice LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Morrow, Umatilla, and Wheeler Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Enter from the front lobby doors on SE Byers Avenue, south side of the building. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MATERIAL GOODS - HELPING HAND MONEY MANAGEMENT - CAPECO MONEY MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MAIN OFFICE
